认 证 证 书
Certification
授予
is awarded to
中国长城科技集团股份有限公司
China Greatwall Technology Group Co., Ltd.
广东省深圳市宝安区石岩街道宝石东路长城工业园
Greatwall Computer Industry Park, Baoshi East Road, Shiyan Subdistrict,
Bao’an District, Shenzhen City, Guangdong Province, P. R. China.,
认证范围: 人机交互界面产品(外销)、平板电脑、台式电脑、笔记本电脑、
服务器、显示终端一体机的研发、生产和服务
Certification Scope: Research and developments, manufactures, service of human-computer
interaction interface products (export sales), tablet PC, desktop computer,
notebook computer, server, display terminal machine
华测检测认证集团股份有限公司
The Certification Body of Centre Testing International Group Co., Ltd.
兹 证 明
certifies that
上述单位的管理体系已经评审并确认符合下列标准
the Management System of the above organization has been audited and found to
comply with the below requirements of
SA8000: 2014
发证日期 Date of Issue: 2020-12-05
有效日期 Date of Expiry: 2023-12-04
签字
For Signature
SA8000 Program Director
Disclaimer: Social Accountability International and other stakeholders in the SA8000 process only recognize
